chunks.text: MacOS | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar MacOS The EECS department began its support for Mac OS X as a department wide computing platform as of Oct. 1, 2005. This is in line with the overall department’s st

. This is in line with the overall department’s strategic goals and vision, and although it will initially only cover a subset of the services we offer. We will gradually ramp up to offer comprehensive computing and networking support for all Apple s

e computing and networking support for all Apple systems. Some highlights of interest to the general user include: IRIS web site FAQ (How-To documents) Joining the EECS domain Accessing your home directory Macserver and MacSWW Printing Primary Sideba
